calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion & Notice Of Hearing To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered.
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Alexandra Hartley's motion to set aside default and default judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR # 11332 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered
Off Calendar May-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Defendant Alexandra Beraha-Hartley telephone number 707-287-1631 appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court informed Ms. Beraha-Hartley that it could not proceed with her motion because the Plaintiff was not informed of her intent to contest the tentative ruling. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA HARTLEY'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered is off calendar without prejudice to being re-filed. The proof of service for the motion does not state that service of the motion papers was made on counsel for plaintiff Midland Funding. See the substitution of attorney form filed by Midland Funding on July 24, 2013 for the name and address of that counsel.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
